req.title: Close encounter (audit)
req.statement: A clinician shall close an Encounter; closed Encounters shall reject further modifications except for addendum Observations. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-082 defines a state machine (open→finished) with three testable axes: (1) happy-path close sets status=finished and emits AuditEvent, (2) negative path rejects modifications to a finished encounter with HTTP 409, and (3) boundary case tests the single allowed exception—addendum Observations on a closed encounter must succeed. STC drives the primary positive case; NEG drives the rejection case; BVA drives the addendum boundary. A fourth DT case covers the audit trail completeness requirement end-to-end. Together these achieve full Decision-Table coverage of the two-condition table: {encounter_state × operation_type}.

tests.name: test_close_encounter_sets_status_finished_and_emits_audit
preconditions: Clinician auth token is available via <auth_token fixture>
Base URL is available via <base_url fixture>
actions: Fetch the Encounter resource via GET /Encounter/{id}
Query AuditEvent feed for the close operation
expected: At least one AuditEvent record exists referencing the encounter id and action 'close'
trace: R-HLT-082: clinician shall close an Encounter
R-HLT-082: AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation
tests.executable:
def test_close_encounter_sets_status_finished_and_emits_audit(base_url, auth_headers, open_encounter):
    enc_id = open_encounter["id"]

    close_resp = <api_post>(f"{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}/close", headers=auth_headers)
    assert close_resp.status_code == 200
    assert close_resp.json()["status"] == "finished"

    get_resp = <api_get>(f"{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}", headers=auth_headers)
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    assert get_resp.json()["status"] == "finished"

    audit_resp = <api_get>(
        f"{base_url}/AuditEvent",
        params={"entity": f"Encounter/{enc_id}", "action": "close"},
        headers=auth_headers,
    )
    assert audit_resp.status_code == 200
    entries = audit_resp.json().get("entry", [])
    assert len(entries) >= 1
    actions = [e["resource"].get("action") for e in entries]
    assert "close" in actions or any("close" in str(a) for a in actions)

tests.name: test_modify_closed_encounter_returns_409
preconditions: An Encounter exists with status=finished (already closed)
Clinician auth token is available via <auth_token fixture>
Base URL is available via <base_url fixture>
actions: Attempt PUT /Encounter/{id} with a payload that changes encounter.class
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Response body contains an OperationOutcome or error message indicating the encounter is closed
trace: R-HLT-082: closed Encounters shall reject further modifications
R-HLT-082: Error pathway 409 when modifying closed encounter
tests.executable:
def test_modify_closed_encounter_returns_409(base_url, auth_headers, closed_encounter):
    enc_id = closed_encounter["id"]
    mutated = dict(closed_encounter)
    mutated["class"] = {"code": "AMB", "display": "ambulatory"}

    put_resp = <api_put>(
        f"{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}",
        json=mutated,
        headers=auth_headers,
    )
    assert put_resp.status_code == 409

    body = put_resp.json()
    assert "closed" in str(body).lower() or "finished" in str(body).lower() or "conflict" in str(body).lower()

    verify_resp = <api_get>(f"{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}", headers=auth_headers)
    assert verify_resp.json()["status"] == "finished"

tests.name: test_addendum_observation_allowed_on_closed_encounter
preconditions: Clinician auth token is available via <auth_token fixture>
Base URL is available via <base_url fixture>
actions: POST /Observation with category=addendum referencing the closed Encounter
Query AuditEvent for the addendum operation
expected: Created Observation links to the closed Encounter id
AuditEvent is emitted for the addendum Observation creation
trace: R-HLT-082: closed Encounters shall reject further modifications EXCEPT for addendum Observations
R-HLT-082: AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation
tests.executable:
def test_addendum_observation_allowed_on_closed_encounter(base_url, auth_headers, closed_encounter):
    enc_id = closed_encounter["id"]
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Observation",
        "status": "final",
        "category": [{"coding": [{"code": "addendum"}]}],
        "encounter": {"reference": f"Encounter/{enc_id}"},
        "code": {"coding": [{"system": "http://loinc.org", "code": "55607006"}]},
        "valueString": "Addendum note",
    }

    post_resp = <api_post>(f"{base_url}/Observation", json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
    assert post_resp.status_code == 201

    obs = post_resp.json()
    assert obs["encounter"]["reference"] == f"Encounter/{enc_id}"
    assert any("addendum" in str(c) for c in obs.get("category", []))

    obs_id = obs["id"]
    audit_resp = <api_get>(
        f"{base_url}/AuditEvent",
        params={"entity": f"Observation/{obs_id}"},
        headers=auth_headers,
    )
    assert audit_resp.status_code == 200
    assert len(audit_resp.json().get("entry", [])) >= 1

tests.name: test_close_already_closed_encounter_returns_conflict
preconditions: Clinician auth token is available via <auth_token fixture>
Base URL is available via <base_url fixture>
actions: Query AuditEvent to confirm failed attempt is also recorded
expected: Encounter status remains 'finished' (no regression to another state)
AuditEvent is emitted for the failed close attempt (audit of every operation including errors)
trace: R-HLT-082: closed Encounters shall reject further modifications
R-HLT-082: AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation
R-HLT-082: Error pathway 409 when modifying closed encounter
tests.executable:
def test_close_already_closed_encounter_returns_conflict(base_url, auth_headers, closed_encounter):
    enc_id = closed_encounter["id"]

    close_resp = <api_post>(f"{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}/close", headers=auth_headers)
    assert close_resp.status_code == 409

    get_resp = <api_get>(f"{base_url}/Encounter/{enc_id}", headers=auth_headers)
    assert get_resp.json()["status"] == "finished"

    audit_resp = <api_get>(
        f"{base_url}/AuditEvent",
        params={"entity": f"Encounter/{enc_id}", "outcome": "8"},
        headers=auth_headers,
    )
    assert audit_resp.status_code == 200
    entries = audit_resp.json().get("entry", [])
    assert len(entries) >= 1
